ddls:
CREATE TABLE "launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the launch */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time of the launch */,
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payload launched */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the launch (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "launch_site" TEXT /* Site where the launch took place */,
  "launch_provider" TEXT /* Organization or company responsible for the launch */,
  "estimated_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the launch */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost of the launch */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the launch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_payload_id FOREIGN KEY ("payload_id") REFERENCES payloads ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_launches_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "payload_name" TEXT /* Name of the payload */,
  "payload_type" TEXT /* Type of payload (e.g., satellite, simulator, experimental device) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payload */,
  "mass" TEXT /* Mass of the payload in kilograms */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Company or organization that manufactured the payload */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payload was deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payload deployment (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch vehicle to which the variant belongs */,
  "max_payload_capacity" TEXT /* Maximum payload capacity of the variant in kilograms */,
  "thrust" TEXT /* Thrust of the variant in kilonewtons */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES launch_vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the launch vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the launch vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Company or organization that manufactured the launch vehicle */,
  "first_launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the first launch of the vehicle */,
  "last_launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the last launch of the vehicle */,
  "number_of_launches" INTEGER /* Total number of launches for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_vehicle_variants" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch vehicle */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the launch */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the launch was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES launches ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Specific resource or module the permission applies to (e.g., launches, payloads) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)
